data.name: Screen_Main_QuitDialogMessage
data.value: Вы уверены, что хотите выйти из игры?

data.name: Screen_Main_SinglePlayerDescription
data.value: Соревнуйтесь за места в таблице лидеров

data.name: Screen_Main_MultiplayerDescription
data.value: Играйте в пользовательские матчи онлайн с другими игроками

data.name: Screen_Main_CompetitiveDescription
data.value: Соревнуйтесь против игроков по всему миру

data.name: Screen_Main_MapEditorDescription
data.value: Создавайте и редактируйте карты под любые понравившиеся песни

data.name: Screen_Main_DownloadMapsDescription
data.value: Ищите новые песни от сообщества для игры

data.name: Screen_Main_TipImportMapFiles
data.value: Перетащите файлы карты (.qp) в игру, чтобы импортировать их.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipMapPreview
data.value: Нажатие F3 при выборе песни показывает предпросмотр карты.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipPauseSubmission
data.value: Пауза во время игры отменяет отправку счёта.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipReportBug
data.value: Вы можете сообщить об ошибке через GitHub Issues.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipCreateMap
data.value: Перетащите .mp3 файл в игру для создания карты!

data.name: Screen_Main_TipRandomSong
data.value: Нажатие F2 при выборе песни выбирает случайную песню.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipPlayercard
data.value: Нажатие F10 в меню открывает профиль игрока.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipScrollSpeed
data.value: Нажатие F3/F4 в игре меняет скорость прокрутки.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipCalibrateOffset
data.value: Ваша задержка может быть откалибрована в меню настроек.

data.name: Screen_Selection_Scoresonthismapwillbeunranked
data.value: Результаты на этой карте не пойдут в рейтинг!

data.name: Screen_Selection_Youmustbeadonatortoaccessthisleaderboard
data.value: Для доступа к этой таблице лидеров нужно быть донатером!

data.name: Screen_Selection_Youmustbeonlinetoaccessthisleaderboard
data.value: Для доступа к этой таблице лидеров нужно быть онлайн!

data.name: Screen_Selection_Youcannotbeatthisscorewithyourcurrentlyactivatedmodifiers
data.value: С текущими модами результат не будет засчитан!

data.name: Screen_Results_Accuracygraphtooltip
data.value:
Показывает изменение точности на протяжении игры.
Если карта не пройдена, дополнительно появится точность, если все последующие ноты были бы Marvelous.

data.name: Screen_Results_Ratinggraphtooltip
data.value:
Показывает изменение результативности на протяжении игры.
Если карта не пройдена, дополнительно появится результативность, если все последующие ноты были бы Marvelous.

data.name: Screen_Results_Therewasanissuewhileretrievingthereplayforthisscore
data.value: Не удалось загрузить повтор для этого результата!

data.name: Screen_Results_Thereplayforthisscorecouldnotbedownloaded
data.value: Не удалось скачать повтор для этого результата.

data.name: Screen_Results_YouhavealreadyfixedyourlocaloffsetforthismapTheresnoneedtodoitagain
data.value: Вы уже настроили локальную задержку для этой карты! Нет необходимости делать это снова.

data.name: Screen_Results_Thereisnodatatobeabletofixyourlocaloffset
data.value: Недостаточно данных для настройки локальной задержки!

data.name: Screen_Results_Localoffsetchangeconfirmation
data.value: Ваша локальная задержка для этой карты будет изменена с {0} мс до {1} мс.

data.name: Screen_Results_Localoffsetset
data.value: Установлена локальная задержка в {0} мс для этой карты.

data.name: Screen_Results_FailedtosavelocalscoretothedatabasePleasecheckthelogs
data.value: Не удалось сохранить локальный счёт в базу данных. Проверьте логи!

data.name: Screen_Results_TherewasanerrorwhensavingyourreplayCheckRuntimelogformoredetails
data.value: Произошла ошибка при сохранении реплея. Подробности в файле Runtime.log

data.name: Screen_Results_Thereisnoreplaydataavailabletoconvertthisscore
data.value: Нет данных реплея для конвертации этого результата!

data.name: Screen_Options_EnableLongNoteReleaseHitsounds
data.value: Включить Звуки Попаданий при Отпускании Длинных Нот

data.name: Screen_Options_LockWindowsKeyduringgameplay
data.value: Отключить Клавишу Windows во время игры

data.name: Screen_Options_DisplaySongTimeProgressBarTimeNumbers
data.value: Отображать Время Песни на Шкале Времени Песни

data.name: Screen_Options_TintHitlightingBasedOnJudgementColor
data.value: Окрашивать Подсветку Попаданий в Цвет Точности Попаданий

data.name: Screen_Options_LoadSongsFromOtherInstalledGames
data.value: Загрузить Песни из Других Установленных Игр

data.name: Screen_Options_DetectSongsFromOtherInstalledGames
data.value: Найти Песни из Других Установленных Игр

data.name: Screen_Options_UseSmoothAudioFrameTimingDuringGameplay
data.value: Использовать Плавное Аудио/Синхронизацию Кадров во время Игры

data.name: Screen_Options_UseSmoothAudioStartTimingDuringGameplay
data.value: Использовать Плавное Начало Аудио во время Игры

data.name: Screen_Options_DisplayGameplayOverlayShiftF6
data.value: Отображать Оверлей во время Игры (Shift + F6)

data.name: Screen_Options_DisplayRankedAccuracyWithCustomJudgements
data.value: Отображать Рейтинговую Точность с Пользовательской Строгостью Попаданий

data.name: Screen_Options_NormaliseScrollVelocityByRatePercentage
data.value: Корректировать Скорость Прокрутки в зависимости от Темпа

data.name: Screen_Options_Display1v1PlayfieldScores
data.value: Отображать Результаты на Игровом Поле 1 на 1

data.name: Screen_Options_DisplayRankedAccuracyForLocalLeaderboards
data.value: Отображать Рейтинговую Точность в Локальной Таблице Лидеров

data.name: Screen_Download_RecommendDifficultyDescription
data.value: Найти карты, соответствующие вашему уровню игры, для выбранного режима?

data.name: Screen_Download_Findnewsongstoplayfromthecommunity
data.value: Ищите новые песни от сообщества для игры

data.name: Screen_Download_DisplayExplicitMapsets
data.value: Показывать Наборы Карт с Нецензурным Содержанием

data.name: Screen_Download_NoSongSelectedDescription
data.value: Чтобы начать загрузку, дважды кликните по песне. Одиночный клик позволяет прослушать отрывок песни. Используйте фильтры ниже, чтобы уточнить поиск.

data.name: Screen_Multi_ConfirmReadyMessage
data.value: Так как вы хост, раунд начнётся, как только вы подтвердите готовность. Вы уверены, что хотите начать, не дождавшись всех игроков?

data.name: Screen_Multi_ExitToLobbyMessage
data.value: Вы уверены, что хотите выйти в лобби?

data.name: Screen_Multi_ChangeGameNameMessage
data.value: Введите новое имя для многопользовательской игры..

data.name: Screen_Multi_ChangeGamePasswordMessage
data.value: Введите новый пароль для многопользовательской игры...

data.name: Screen_Multi_UploadUnsubmittedMapsetConfirmMessage
data.value: Загрузить текущий набор карт на сервер, чтобы другие игроки смогли его загрузить?

data.name: Screen_Multi_SuccessfullyUploadedUnsubmittedMapset
data.value: Набор карт успешно загружен для многопользовательской игры!

data.name: Screen_Multi_UploadMapsetError
data.value: Произошла ошибка при загрузке набора карт.

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_HeaderDescription
data.value: играйте в реальном времени с другими игроками

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_WaitUntilMatchFinishes
data.value: Подождите, пока матч не закончится, прежде чем выполнить это действие.

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_WaitUntilMatchFinishesBeforeReadying
data.value: Подождите, пока матч не закончится, прежде чем подтвердить готовность.

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_CannotReadyWithoutMap
data.value: Вы не можете подтвердить готовность, если у вас нет этой карты!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_WaitUntilMatchFinishesBeforeSelectingMap
data.value: Подождите, пока матч не закончится, прежде чем выбрать другую карты.

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_CannotSelectMapIfNotHost
data.value: Вы не можете выбрать карту если вы не хост!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_WaitUntilMatchFinishesBeforeSelectingMods
data.value: Подождите, пока матч не закончится, прежде чем выбрать моды.

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_CannotSwitchTeamsDuringCountdown
data.value: Вы не можете сменить команду, пока обратный отчёт идет.

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_MapMissingClickToDownload
data.value: У вас нет этой карты. Нажмите чтобы загрузить!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_MapMissingDownloadNotAvailable
data.value: У вас нет этой карты. Загрузка не доступна!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_MapsetAlreadyDownloading
data.value: Этот набор карт уже загружается. Подождите!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_MatchStartedMissingMap
data.value: Матч начался, но у нас нет этой карты!

data.name: Screen_Multiplayer_MatchStartedReferee
data.value: Матч начался. Нажмите, чтобы посмотреть трансляцию матча в качестве судьи.

data.name: Screen_MultiplayerLobby_EnterGamePasswordMessage
data.value: Введите пароль для подключения к многопользовательской игре

data.name: Screen_MultiplayerLobby_CreateMultiplayerGameMessage
data.value: Заполните подробности для создания многопользовательской игры...

data.name: Screen_MultiplayerLobby_CannotCreateGameWithoutMap
data.value: Вы не можете создать игру, не выбрав карту!

data.name: Screen_Editor_PlaceObjectsWithTopRowNumbers
data.value: Размещать Объекты с помощью Клавиш Верхнего Числового Ряда

data.name: Screen_Editor_SnapNotesWhenLiveMapping
data.value: Привязка Нот во время Живого Маппинга

data.name: Screen_Editor_SetLiveMappingOffset
data.value: Установить Смещение для Нот, размещённых во время Живого Маппинга

data.name: Screen_Editor_PlaceLongNotesWhenLiveMapping
data.value: Размещать Длинные Ноты во время Живого Маппинга

data.name: Screen_Editor_SetLiveMappingLongNoteMinimumLength
data.value: Установить Минимальную Длину Длинных Нот, размещённых во время Живого Маппинга

data.name: Screen_Editor_ColorSvLinesByTimingGroup
data.value: Красить Линии Скорости Прокрутки по Группам Тайминга

data.name: Screen_Editor_WindowLayoutResetOnNextOpen
data.value: Расположение окон будет сброшено при следующем открытии редактора!

data.name: Screen_Editor_BookmarkDialogMessage
data.value: Add a custom note for your bookmark...

data.name: Screen_Editor_CreateNewMapsetMessage
data.value: To create a new mapset, drag a .mp3 file into the game window...

data.name: Screen_Editor_DetectedManualFileChangesMessage
data.value: There were manual changes detected to the .qua file. Would you like to reload the editor?

data.name: Screen_Editor_ApplyOffsetToMapMessage
data.value: Enter a value to apply an offset to all of your map's objects, timing points, and scroll velocities...

data.name: Screen_Editor_ApplyOffsetPlaceholder
data.value: Enter an offset to apply to your map...

data.name: Screen_Editor_SaveBeforeCreatingDifficulty
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Would you like to save before creating a new difficulty?

data.name: Screen_Editor_SaveBeforeSwitchingDifficulty
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Would you like to save before switching to another difficulty?

data.name: Screen_Editor_MapSavedSuccessfully
data.value: Your map has been successfully saved!

data.name: Screen_Editor_SaveBeforeExit
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Would you like to save?

data.name: Screen_Editor_SubmitForRankConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you would like to submit your mapset for rank? Note: It must follow the ranking criteria in order to be accepted.

data.name: Screen_Editor_CustomBeatSnapMessage
data.value: Enter a value or range of values for the custom beat snap divisor (1/?)...

data.name: Screen_Editor_CustomBeatSnapPlaceholder
data.value: Enter a beat snap value or range (max 48, e.g. "7" or "5-9")

data.name: Screen_Editor_SetLiveMapOffsetMessage
data.value: Enter a value to apply an offset to notes placed during live-mapping...

data.name: Screen_Editor_SetLiveMapLongNoteThresholdMessage
data.value: Enter the minimum length of a long note during live-mapping...

data.name: Screen_Editor_SetLiveMapLongNoteThresholdPlaceholder
data.value: Enter a threshold of LNs during livemapping...

data.name: Screen_Editor_ChangeTimingGroupColorMessage
data.value: Enter a new RGB color for your timing group...

data.name: Screen_Editor_ChangeWaveformColorMessage
data.value: Enter a new RGB color for your waveform... (default: 0,200,255)

data.name: Screen_Editor_AddDifficultyFromFileMessage
data.value: Drag a .qua file into the window to add it to the mapset.

data.name: Screen_Editor_InvalidQuaFile
data.value: The .qua file you have dragged in is not valid!

data.name: Screen_Editor_CreateDifficultyError
data.value: There was an issue while creating a new difficulty.

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadMapsetConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you would like to upload your mapset to the server? Note: You must own the rights to all files you upload.

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotSubmitRankedMapset
data.value: You cannot submit a mapset that is already ranked!

data.name: Screen_Editor_MapsetDoesNotBelongToYou
data.value: This mapset does not belong to you! The creator usernames of every map do not match yours.

data.name: Screen_Editor_ApplyModifierConfirmation
data.value:
Would like to apply the modifier: "{0}" to your map?
This action is NOT reversible! Choose wisely.

data.name: Screen_Editor_ChangeBackgroundOrBannerMessage
data.value: Would you like to change the background or the banner?

data.name: Screen_Editor_BackgroundChangedSuccessfully
data.value: Your background has been successfully changed!

data.name: Screen_Editor_ChangeBackgroundError
data.value: There was an issue changing your background!

data.name: Screen_Editor_ChangingBannerMessage
data.value: Please wait while your banner is being changed...

data.name: Screen_Editor_ChangeBannerError
data.value: There was an issue changing your banner!

data.name: Screen_Editor_SubmittingForRankMessage
data.value: Please wait while your map is being submitted for rank...

data.name: Screen_Editor_RankingIssuesFound
data.value: Your mapset has issues that prevent it from being ranked. Please review the AutoMod for each difficulty, and then try again.

data.name: Screen_Editor_SubmitForRankError
data.value: An error occurred while submitting your mapset for rank.

data.name: Screen_Editor_BpmAffectsSvTooltip
data.value: When set to ON, A BPM change will also change the Scroll Velocity. For instance, going from 120BPM to 240BPM effectively creates an implicit 2x Scroll Velocity multiplier starting from the beginning of that BPM change until the next. Scroll Velocity is still applied.

data.name: Screen_Editor_LegacyLnRenderingTooltip
data.value: When set to ON, forces the use of the old LN renderer. If your map has no Scroll Velocity changes, you can safely ignore this option. The current LN renderer places the head and tail to the earliest and latest positions reached, respectively. The old LN renderer instead places them both wherever the playfield happens to be at the time.

data.name: Screen_Editor_SyncMetadataTooltip
data.value: Copy all of the metadata from this difficulty to all of the difficulties from this mapset

data.name: Screen_Editor_EditMetadataMessage
data.value: Edit the values to change the metadata...

data.name: Screen_Editor_SourcePlaceholder
data.value: Source of the song (album, mixtape, etc)

data.name: Screen_Editor_TagsPlaceholder
data.value: Comma-separated tags to help players find your map

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotEditImportedMapMetadata
data.value: You cannot edit the metadata for a map loaded from another game.

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotDeleteDefaultLayer
data.value: You cannot delete the default layer!

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotRenameDefaultLayer
data.value: You cannot rename the default layer!

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotRecolorDefaultLayer
data.value: You cannot recolor the default layer!

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotDeleteDefaultTimingGroups
data.value: You cannot delete the default timing groups!

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotSaveImportedMap
data.value: You cannot save a map loaded from another game!

data.name: Screen_Editor_SaveMapError
data.value: There was an issue while saving your map!

data.name: Screen_Editor_FinishBeforeTestPlaying
data.value: Finish what you're doing before test playing!

data.name: Screen_Editor_CreateMapsetError
data.value: There was an issue while creating a new mapset.

data.name: Screen_Editor_SwitchDifficultyError
data.value: There was an issue while switching difficulty.

data.name: Screen_Editor_MustBeLoggedInToUpload
data.value: You must be logged in to upload your mapset!

data.name: Screen_Editor_Only4KAnd7KRanked
data.value: Only 4K and 7K are allowed for ranking.

data.name: Screen_Editor_ExportingMapset
data.value: Please wait while the mapset is being exported...

data.name: Screen_Editor_MapsetExportedSuccessfully
data.value: The mapset has been successfully exported!

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotImportCurrentKeymap
data.value: You cannot import the keymap you are already using!

data.name: Screen_Editor_AddBackgroundImageInstruction
data.value: To add a background image, drag a .jpg or .png file into the window.

data.name: Screen_Editor_LoadMapError
data.value: There was an issue while loading this map in the editor.

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotChangeAudioRateFurther
data.value: You cannot change the audio rate this way any further!

data.name: Screen_Editor_CacheUpdatedOnExit
data.value: The cached data for this file will be updated when you leave the editor.

data.name: Screen_Editor_NoHitObjectsPastThisPoint
data.value: There aren't any hitobjects to play past this point!

data.name: Screen_Editor_TimingPointRequiredForTestPlay
data.value: A timing point must be added to your map before test playing!

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotCreateDifficultyForImportedMap
data.value: You cannot create new difficulties for maps from other games. Create a new set!

data.name: Screen_Editor_MustBeLoggedInToSubmitForRank
data.value: You must be logged in to submit your mapset for rank!

data.name: Screen_Editor_SaveAndUploadBeforeSubmitForRank
data.value: Your map has unsaved changes. Please save & upload before submitting for rank.

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotSetImportedMapBackground
data.value: You cannot set a new background for a map loaded from another game.

data.name: Screen_Editor_AddBookmarkTooltip
data.value: Adds a bookmark at the current position the timeline. - Hover over a bookmark tick to view the note associated with it. - Left click a bookmark tick to edit it. - Right click a bookmark tick to delete it. Hotkey: CTRL + B

data.name: Screen_Editor_BeatSnapTooltip
data.value: Change the current beat snap divisor. Hotkeys: CTRL + Up/Down/Scroll Wheel

data.name: Screen_Editor_PlaybackSpeedTooltip
data.value: Change the audio playback rate. Hotkeys: CTRL + -/+

data.name: Screen_Editor_TestPlayTooltip
data.value: Save and test play your map. Right-clicking will allow you to select modifers to use while test playing. Hotkey: F4

data.name: Screen_Editor_TimingPointHelp
data.value: Timing Points are individual BPM sections within your map. This will allow you to place objects at the correct times in the song.

data.name: Screen_Editor_TimingPointInteractionHelp
data.value: You can click on an individual Timing Point to edit it or double-click to go to its position in time.

data.name: Screen_Editor_SelectCurrentTimingPointTooltip
data.value: This will select the timing point at the current editor timestamp. If Ctrl is held, it will add it to your selection instead. If Shift is held, it will select all timing points up to that range, if one is selected already.

data.name: Screen_Editor_ScrollVelocityHelp
data.value: Scroll Velocities (SV) allow you to dynamically change the speed and direction at which the objects fall.

data.name: Screen_Editor_ScrollVelocityInteractionHelp
data.value: You can click on an individual SV point to edit it and double-click to go to its position in time.

data.name: Screen_Editor_SelectTimingGroupOfSelectedNotes
data.value: Select Timing Group Of Selected Notes

data.name: Screen_Editor_SelectNotesInTimingGroupsTooltip
data.value: Selects all notes in the selected timing group(s).

data.name: Screen_Editor_FilterSelectionTooltip
data.value: Deselect any note that is not in any of the selected timing group(s).

data.name: Screen_Editor_TimingGroupHelp
data.value: Timing Groups allow you to change the visuals of a group of notes.

data.name: Screen_Editor_TimingGroupInteractionHelp
data.value: You can click on an individual timing group to edit it and double-click to go to the first note in the group.

data.name: Screen_Editor_TimingGroupNamePlaceholder
data.value: Alphanumeric characters or underscore are allowed

data.name: Screen_Editor_TimingGroupCannotBeRenamed
data.value: This timing group cannot be renamed!

data.name: Screen_Editor_KeybindEditorDescription
data.value: Change the keymap of the editor

data.name: Screen_Editor_KeybindEditorHelpSelectAction
data.value: To change the keybind of an action, first click on the action.

data.name: Screen_Editor_KeybindEditorHelpChangeOrRemove
data.value: You can then choose to change or remove any keys from the action.

data.name: Screen_Editor_KeybindEditorHelpAdd
data.value: You can also add a key by clicking on the '+' button.

data.name: Screen_Editor_FreeKeybindTooltip
data.value: Turning on Free means that pressing the key with additional modifiers (ctrl, alt, ...) will also trigger the action.

data.name: Screen_Editor_SvVsSfTooltip
data.value: SV will not move the notes but only change its speed, whereas SF will directly change both their position and speed

data.name: Screen_Editor_ScrollSpeedFactorHelp
data.value: Scroll Speed Factors (SSF) allow you to scale the distance from the notes to the receptor directly

data.name: Screen_Editor_ScrollSpeedFactorMultiplierHelp
data.value: SSF is a multiplier to your current scroll speed. The entries you add will be linearly transformed from one to another, like keyframes.

data.name: Screen_Editor_ScrollSpeedFactorInteractionHelp
data.value: You can click on an individual SSF point to edit it and double-click to go to its position in time.

data.name: Screen_Editor_SvVsSsfTooltip
data.value: SV will not move the notes but only change its speed, whereas SSF will directly change both their position and speed

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorInternalServer
data.value: An internal server error has occurred. Please try again!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorBanned
data.value: You cannot upload a mapset while banned!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorNoMapsetSent
data.value: No mapset was sent with the request!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorRequestTooLarge
data.value: Your mapset is too large! The max file size is 50mb

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorInvalidMapsetFileExtension
data.value: File extension error. Please report this to a developer!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorMapsetNotZipFile
data.value: Your mapset was not a zip file. Please report this to a developer!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorInvalidFileType
data.value: Your mapset contains files of an invalid type!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorNoContainingQuaFiles
data.value: Your mapset does not contain any .qua files!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorInvalidMapFile
data.value: One or more of your map files are invalid! (No objects, timing points?)!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorInvalidMapMetadata
data.value: One or more of your map files do not have completed metadata!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorUserNotCreator
data.value: You are not the creator of this mapset!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorConflictingMapIds
data.value: One or more of your maps have conflicting map ids!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorConflictingMapsetIds
data.value: One or more of your maps have conflicting mapset ids!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorConflictingDifficultyNames
data.value: One or more of your maps have the same difficulty name!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorNoExistingMapsetFound
data.value: You're trying to update a mapset, but this mapset isn't uploaded online!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorAlreadyRanked
data.value: You cannot update a mapset that is already ranked!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorContainsNonUploadedNotNewMapId
data.value: One or more of your maps contains a non-uploaded map id!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadSuccessUploaded
data.value: Success! Your mapset has been uploaded!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadSuccessUpdated
data.value: Success! Your mapset has been updated!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadErrorExceededLimit
data.value: You have exceeded the amount of maps you can upload at this time!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadingMapsetMessage
data.value: Please wait while your mapset is being uploaded...

data.name: Screen_Editor_MapsetSavedSuccessfully
data.value: Your mapset has been successfully saved!

data.name: Screen_Editor_MapsetUploadedSuccessfully
data.value: Your mapset has been successfully uploaded!

data.name: Screen_Editor_UploadMapsetError
data.value: There was an issue while uploading your mapset

data.name: Screen_Editor_AddBackgroundImageInstructionPngJpg
data.value: To add a background image, drag a .png or .jpg into the window.

data.name: Screen_Editor_SelectObjectsBeforeChangingHitsounds
data.value: You need to select objects before changing their hitsounds!

data.name: Screen_Editor_RenameLayerMessage
data.value: Enter a new name for your layer...

data.name: Screen_Editor_ChangeLayerColorMessage
data.value: Enter a new RGB color for your layer...

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotMoveLayerPastDefault
data.value: Cannot move layer past the default layer!

data.name: Screen_Editor_LayerAlreadyAtTop
data.value: Layer is already at the top!

data.name: Screen_Editor_CannotEditDefaultLayer
data.value: You cannot edit the default layer!

data.name: Screen_Editor_DetectBpmAndOffsetError
data.value: Failed to detect BPM and offset!

data.name: Screen_Editor_DenseLinesDetected
data.value: Dense lines detected. Lines will be drawn less frequently.

data.name: Screen_Editor_NextBookmarkTooltip
data.value: Seek to the next bookmark in the timeline. Hotkey: CTRL + Right

data.name: Screen_Editor_PreviousBookmarkTooltip
data.value: Seek to the previous bookmark in the timeline. Hotkey: CTRL + Left

data.name: Screen_Editor_DefaultTimingGroupTooltip
data.value: Applied to all notes that are not in a timing group.

data.name: Screen_Editor_GlobalTimingGroupTooltip
data.value: The SVs in this group are interlaced to every other scroll groups.

data.name: Screen_Editor_SelectCurrentSsfTooltip
data.value: This will select the SSF at the current editor timestamp. If Ctrl is held, it will add it to your selection instead. If Shift is held, it will select all SSFs up to that range, if one is selected already.

data.name: Screen_Editor_SelectCurrentSvTooltip
data.value: This will select the SV at the current editor timestamp. If Ctrl is held, it will add it to your selection instead. If Shift is held, it will select all SVs up to that range, if one is selected already.

data.name: Screen_Editor_ApplyKeymapConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to overwrite your keymap? You might want to back up your keymap first.

data.name: Screen_Editor_AutoModWarningTooltip
data.value: This is a warning of a potential error. You can ignore this if it isn't an issue.

data.name: Screen_Editor_AutoModCriticalTooltip
data.value: This is a critical error which affects the playability of your map.

data.name: Screen_Editor_AutoModRankingTooltip
data.value: This is a ranking criteria error. Without fixing this, your map cannot be ranked.

data.name: Screen_Editor_NoSnapDivisionsSelected
data.value: You have not selected any divisions to snap!

data.name: Screen_Editor_ResetAllKeybindsConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset all keybinds?
